title: Shadows of Brimstone - Part 9 - Derelict Ship Expansion
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bqf0zywB-Wo

Daniel (@dungeondive) explores the Derelict Ship otherworld expansion, a haunted spaceship themed around Event Horizon and Alien. The starship Vostros, launched from Saturn's orbital shipyards in 2247, used an experimental dark stone warp drive to fold space — and brought something terrible back with it.

The expansion introduces three enemy types: beacon drones (energy-shielded navigators with 18 health), necronauts (skeletal astronauts in spacesuits that cap at two damage per hit with a brutal defense of four), and auto turrets (stationary ranged threats). Daniel singles out the necronaut sculpt as one of his favourite models in any game — that skull inside the helmet is genuinely evocative.

New map tiles feature hydroponic gardens (a novel circular shape), cold storage with stasis pods, a bridge, and star maps. The world rule "Interstellar Horror" punishes failed hold-back-the-darkness rolls with sanity damage, while successful scavenging yields loot on a 5+ roll. Six missions range from collapsing vortexes to a massive pre-made Captain's Log map. Artifacts lean into sci-fi territory: warp pistols, plasma torches, void grenades, and a space parasite. Daniel shares his house rules for pooled gold and experience and town-only leveling, noting they reduce mid-mission bookkeeping.

----

Which Shadows of Brimstone otherworld theme appeals to you most — haunted spaceship, fiery caverns, or war-torn alien world?
